commands.review_summary:
The PR adds publisher-abuse autoban processing, a daily backup cron, temporal-run eligibility tracking, account-ban integration, reauth/appeal/email handling, and moderation docs/spec updates.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new moderation automation PR rather than a bug report. The evidence path is source review plus PR tests/CI, not a current-main reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is appropriate because this member-authored PR changes account-ban enforcement policy and needs runtime/rollout approval rather than an automated repair.

target.title: Auto-ban publisher abuse candidates
target.body:
## Summary
- Auto-ban pending publisher-abuse nominations labeled `potential_ban_candidate` when they come from a complete current enforcement run.
- Add safety gates for stale runs, failed runs, backfills, official publishers, staff accounts, missing owners, and changed publisher-owner links.
- Wire publisher-abuse autobans through the normal account-ban effects: audit log, token revocation, owned listing removal/hiding, notification email, reauth blocking, and appeal matching.

## What Changed
- Adds `processPublisherAbuseAutobansInternal` and a daily `publisher-abuse-autobans` cron backup sweep.
- Runs autoban processing after completed publisher-abuse pressure scoring and complete current temporal scans.
- Tracks temporal scoring mode/completion on score runs so historical or incomplete temporal scans cannot auto-ban.
- Adds `autobanPublisherAbuseOwnerInternal` to validate the pending nomination, current linked publisher owner, and official-publisher exclusion before banning.
- Reopens failed-run deferrals when a later completed pressure score nominates the same publisher as a `potential_ban_candidate`.
- Updates moderation docs/specs for publisher-abuse autobans and appeal matching.

## Proof
| Evidence | Claim Proved | How To Check |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `convex/publisherAbuse.ts` | Only pending `potential_ban_candidate` nominations from completed eligible runs are processed; skipped nominations are moved out of pending with notes. | Review `getPublisherAbuseAutobanEligibility` and `autoBanPublisherAbuseCandidatesPageInternalHandler`. |
| `convex/users.ts` | Publisher-abuse autobans use the account-ban flow and record `user.autoban.publisher_abuse`. | Review `autobanPublisherAbuseOwnerInternal`. |
| `convex/schema.ts` | Temporal mode/completion can be indexed to find the latest complete current temporal run. | Review the new score-run fields and index. |
| `convex/*test.ts` | Regression coverage covers the autoban path, exclusions, stale/failed run behavior, auth blocking, emails, cron registration, and appeals. | Run the focused Vitest command below. |

## Verification
```text
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
bun run test -- convex/publisherAbuse.test.ts convex/users.test.ts convex/auth.test.ts convex/crons.test.ts convex/lib/emails.test.ts
bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false
bun run ci:static
bun run ci:unit
bun run ci:types-build
```

Results:
```text
focused tests: 5 files passed, 183 tests passed
ci:static: passed
ci:unit: 264 files passed, 3279 tests passed, 1 skipped; coverage thresholds passed
ci:types-build: passed
```

Not verified:
```text
Convex dev/deploy runtime push was not run from this worktree because .env.local and .convex are not linked here.
```
